vision: Track every meaningful AI development tool on GitHub. 10K repos by end of March 2026. 100K by end of April 2026.

working.name: reporium.com
working.evidence: Live — 1406 repos. Repo cards fixed: system tags removed from chips, builder badges correct, category aliases resolved, timeline section guarded. Filter bar clean (no stale Audio/Deployment/Fine Tuning tabs). MetricsSidebar LIBRARY BY CATEGORY fixed (normalizedCategories passed). AI Dev Coverage all green. Builders section showing correct orgs. CI green, GitHub Pages deployed. reporium v0.6.1 released.

working.name: reporium-api v1.5.0
working.evidence: 1406 repos, 6209 knowledge graph edges. Prompt injection prevention in /intelligence/query (input validation, XML structural delimiters, hardened system prompt). SQL injection fix. KNOWN_ORG_CATEGORIES overrides for 35 orgs. 32 unit tests passing.

working.name: reporium-ingestion v1.3.0
working.evidence: 826/826 repos enriched (Claude API, $2.52). 14K tags, 2K pmSkills, 918 industries, 825 builders, 4920 categories. backfill_fork_dates.py ready to run.

working.name: forksync v2
working.evidence: Cloud Run nightly sync, SYNC_REPORT.md committed after each run.

working.name: reporium-events
working.evidence: GCP Pub/Sub topic 'reporium-events' live. Event schemas: sync.completed, db.synced, ingestion.completed, repo.added, repo.updated, health.check, build.failed, api.deployed. Publisher client with atomic build_number counter in Firestore. Validated payload schemas.

working.name: reporium-audit
working.evidence: Nightly 8am UTC audit of all platform components, AUDIT_REPORT.md auto-generated.

working.name: perditio-devkit
working.evidence: Shared tooling: badges, GitHub client, file utilities — used by all repos.

not_working.name: fork timeline dates
not_working.reason: forked_at, your_last_push_at, upstream_created_at empty for all 1390 forks. backfill_fork_dates.py script exists but not yet run against production DB. Timeline section hidden on cards until backfill runs.

not_working.name: reporium-api Cloud Run redeploy
not_working.reason: v1.5.0 code on GitHub but Cloud Run deploy workflow failed (GCP_SA_KEY issue). Needs manual trigger.

not_working.name: reporium-api CORS
not_working.reason: allow_origins=['*'] in main.py. Tracked in issue #7.

sdlc.workflow: Git Flow — feature/fix branches from dev, PR to dev, PR dev→main, release tag on main

branches.dev: integration — all feature/fix PRs merge here first
branches.hotfix/*: emergency production fixes, cut from main, merged to both main and dev

sdlc.versioning: semver — PATCH=bugfix, MINOR=new feature, MAJOR=breaking change
sdlc.events: Publish to reporium-events GCP Pub/Sub on all significant pipeline completions

fixing_now.name: fork timeline dates backfill
fixing_now.description: Run backfill_fork_dates.py against production Neon DB to populate forked_at, your_last_push_at, upstream_created_at for 1390 forks.

fixing_now.name: reporium-api Cloud Run redeploy
fixing_now.description: Redeploy API v1.5.0 with security fixes. Check GCP_SA_KEY secret.

items: Fork timeline dates backfilled and visible on cards
reporium-events integration in reporium-api (publish api.deployed on deploy)

coming_next.name: repo-intelligence
coming_next.description: 0-100 repo scorer: README, activity, community, CI. Pip-installable.

coming_next.name: github-ai-trends
coming_next.description: Daily GitHub trending scraper for AI repos. Feeds new repo candidates to reporium-db.

coming_next.name: reporium frontend v2
coming_next.description: Figma-designed UI: faster, cleaner, better filtering

backlog.name: reporium-trending
backlog.description: Multi-source trend aggregation across GitHub, LinkedIn, X. Requires dedicated infrastructure.

changelog.notes: MetricsSidebar LIBRARY BY CATEGORY fixed: normalizedCategories passed so stale Audio/Deployment entries no longer appear. jest worktree exclusion added. reporium v0.6.1 tagged.

Repo card fixes: system tags removed, category aliases, builder badge, timeline guard. Filter bar stale category normalization. AI Dev Coverage badges all green. Builders section restored. Prompt injection prevention + SQL injection fix in reporium-api. 32 unit tests. SDLC: Git Flow established, dev branch on all repos, CONTRIBUTING.md, semver releases.
reporium-api security: private repo exposure fixed (is_private column, WHERE is_private=false). Redis Memorystore cache enabled via VPC connector. CI workflows across suite.
reporium-api deployed to Cloud Run, reporium-events Pub/Sub system, reporium-audit nightly health checks, perditio-devkit shared tooling.
reporium-db, reporium-dataset, reporium-metrics, portfolio, repo-intelligence all launched.
forksync v2 launched on Cloud Run (68s for 818 repos).
